data.body: LIVE JIRA PROBES (user-requested safety check on the reconciler change). (1) READ-ONLY probe via changed code: config.reconciler.backend='jira' -> select_backend() -> JiraBackend -> transport=AcliClient from rebar_reconciler.adapters.jira.acli (S5 moved path); LIVE get_myself() authed OK, get_server_info()=Jira Cloud, search_issues(project=REB) read 3 real issues. Validates S4 transport construction + S5 module move live, zero writes. (2) WRITE probe via sanctioned 'rebar bridge-probe' (jira-capability-probe.py, imports the MOVED adapters.jira.acli): all 6 steps PASS -> STEP_CREATE/LABEL/PROPERTY_WRITE/JQL_SEARCH/PROPERTY_READ/STEP_DELETE. Self-cleaning (finally-block delete). CLEANUP VERIFIED ABSOLUTE: Jira search 'rebar capability probe' = 0 lingering issues; local store 1368 tickets, 0 probe-titled tickets (probe creates NO local ticket by construction + rebar-id label blocks adoption). Conclusion: live Jira create/read/update/label/property/search/delete + transport construction all functional through the changed code; nothing left behind in either Jira or local.
